items.title: US House votes to end government shutdown over immigration operations
items.summary: The bill, already cleared by the US Senate, now moves to the desk of President Donald Trump who is expected to swiftly sign the legislation.

items.title: Iranians Live With Pain and Powerlessness, Beneath a Smooth Veneer
items.summary: After months of upheaval, many are attempting to get on with their lives while quietly grappling with grief, economic stress and a loss of hope.
